evals.prompt: I need to commit my changes. Please stage what is needed and propose a commit message.
evals.expected_output: Asks for permission to run git commands and whether to stage all files, then proposes a commit message format.

evals.prompt: There are changes in src/api and docs. Split into multiple commits and help me stage them.
evals.expected_output: Proposes multiple commits grouped by area, asks for staging permission, and offers interactive file selection.
